articles.title: Analysis: Has Starmer done enough to save his premiership?
articles.description: Was the prime minister's speech enough to avert a challenge to his leadership less than two years after he won a landslide general election victory?

articles.title: British passengers from cruise ship isolating in hospital
articles.description: The passengers landed in the UK on Sunday and none have reported symptoms, but they will will be monitored in hospital for 72 hours.

articles.title: Washington correspondents'  dinner shooting suspect pleads not guilty
articles.description: Cole Tomas Allen, 31, was charged with attempting to assassinate US President Donald Trump.

articles.title: Martin Lewis delivers emotional speech, and nine other Bafta TV moments
articles.description: There were tears, surprises and fabulous outfits - as one of the biggest nights for UK television took place.
